language.name: English
main.allowLaunch.tip: Enable launch actions (apps/files/URLs). Off by default for safety.
main.detect.tip: Auto: poll for devices periodically  /  Manual: detect only on "Refresh now"
main.obs.title: OBS connection (obs-websocket)
main.obs.pass.tip: OBS WebSocket password (leave blank if not set)
editor.title: Edit profiles
editor.targetApp: Target app (pick a running app, or type a name → add candidate)
editor.targetApp.tip: Pick from processes that have a visible window
editor.learnLast.tip: Capture the most recent MIDI signal into the edited binding's kind/number/ch/device
editor.saveBinding.tip: Confirm and save the edited signal (discarded if you pick another binding or close)
editor.autosaveHint: Changes are saved automatically (only the signal needs "Save binding")
editor.label: Label (optional)
editor.bindingPlaceholder: Add a binding or select one from the list to edit it here.
editor.help.fields: No.: note/CC number (0–127, blank for PitchBend)　／　ch: channel (1–16, any for all)　／　Device: device name (* for any)　／　Detail: enter as described by the Action above
editor.help.label: Label (optional): a memo for the binding; has no effect on behavior
field.device.tip: Device: matched by regex (* for any). e.g. ^MPK
tip.key: Key (e.g. ctrl+z). Pick from candidates or type freely (invalid values are red)
tip.switchProfile: next / prev / toggle or a profile id (invalid values are red)
tip.none: This binding does nothing (blocks the same assignment in the base profile)
tip.brightness: Sets screen brightness from the input value (Absolute trigger recommended). Built-in displays.
tip.launch.target: Target: executable / file / URL / ms-settings: etc.
tip.uia.pick: After pressing, hover the target UI element within 3 seconds to capture it
tip.uia.window: Target window regex (matched against process\ntitle). e.g. ^notepad
tip.obs.arg: sceneswitch = scene name / togglemute = input name (unused for others)
tip.midiout.msg: Message: kind ch number value (cc 1 7 64 / note 1 60 100 / cc 1 7 value for input-driven / pc 1 5)
tip.macro.chords: One key per line (e.g. ctrl+c / ctrl+v / enter)
tip.toggle.keyB: Key B (even presses; same as A if blank)
tip.toggle.led: LED feedback (optional): output device name, note number, [ch] (e.g. loopMIDI 36 1)
tip.plugin.id: Plugin id (published by an extension in the plugins folder)
dialog.title: Action settings
dialog.testNote: * Runs the unsaved settings as-is. For key-based actions, focus the target window before running.
help.signalKind.NoteOn: Fires the instant a key/pad is pressed
help.signalKind.NoteOff: Fires the instant a key/pad is released
help.signalKind.Note: Both press and release (use for hold-while-pressed behavior)
help.signalKind.Cc: Fires when a knob/fader etc. moves (continuous 0–127)
help.signalKind.PitchBend: Fires when the pitch-bend wheel moves (no number)
help.trigger.Trigger: Fires once when at/above the threshold (button-like single action)
help.trigger.Hold: Active only while held (NoteOn presses, NoteOff releases)
help.trigger.Absolute: Treats the input value (0–127) as a continuous amount (fader → scroll amount etc.)
help.trigger.Relative: Treats the change as a relative delta (for endless encoders)
help.action.Key: Keyboard input. Specify keys in Detail like "ctrl+z"
help.action.MouseClick: Mouse click. Detail: left / right / middle (x2 for double-click)
help.action.WindowControl: Control the foreground window. Detail: minimize / maximize / restore / close / topmost
help.action.MediaKey: Media key. Detail: playpause / next / previous / stop / mute / volumeup / volumedown
help.action.TypeText: Types the text in Detail verbatim (snippet). Newlines allowed
help.action.Launch: Launch app/file/URL. Detail = target; arguments & working dir below. Requires external-launch opt-in.
help.action.SetVolume: Set volume from the input value (Absolute fader recommended). Detail: master / microphone
help.action.Uia: Operate a UI element in another window. Element name + target window + verb (invoke/toggle/setvalue). "Pick element" captures the element under the cursor.
help.action.VirtualDesktop: Switch virtual desktop (Win+Ctrl+Arrow). Detail: next / previous
help.action.WindowsToggle: Toggle a Windows setting. Detail: darkmode (dark/light theme)
help.action.Brightness: Set screen brightness from the input value (Absolute fader recommended). Built-in displays (laptops etc.)
help.action.Http: Send an HTTP request/webhook. Detail = URL; method & body below (Home Assistant / IFTTT etc.)
help.action.Osc: Send an OSC message (UDP). Detail = address (e.g. /1/fader1); destination host:port and args below
help.action.Obs: Control OBS (obs-websocket). Pick an operation. sceneswitch = scene name / togglemute = input name in Detail. Connection is set on the main screen.
help.action.MidiOut: Send a MIDI message to an output device (for virtual ports). Detail = output device name (regex); message below
help.action.Macro: Run several key inputs in order. One chord per line (e.g. ctrl+c). Step delay (ms) below
help.action.Toggle: Alternate between key A and key B on each press. The LED field reflects the state on a controller LED via "device note [ch]".
help.action.Plugin: Call a plugin (an extension in the plugins folder). Detail = plugin id; command & args below
help.action.SwitchProfile: Switch profile. Detail: next / prev / toggle / profile id
help.action.None: Do nothing (disables = blocks the same assignment from the base profile)
help.instructions.Launch:
Launches an app, file, URL, or ms-settings:.
• Target: executable path / document / https://… / ms-settings:nightlight etc.
• Arguments and working directory are optional
* You must turn on "Allow external launch" on the main screen (off by default).
help.instructions.Uia:
Operates a UI element (button etc.) in another app.
1. Press "Pick element" and hover the target element within 3 seconds
   → the element name and target window are filled in automatically
2. Pick a verb: invoke = press / toggle = switch / setvalue = set a value
3. For setvalue, enter the value.
help.instructions.Osc:
Sends an OSC message over UDP (lighting, VJ, AV gear).
• Address (e.g. /1/fader1), destination host:port, arguments (space-separated)
• Arguments are auto-detected as integer / float / string.
help.instructions.Obs:
Controls OBS Studio via obs-websocket.
• First set "OBS connection" (host/port/password) on the main screen
• Pick an operation. For sceneswitch enter the scene name, for togglemute the input name, in "Detail".
help.instructions.MidiOut:
Sends MIDI to an output device (e.g. a virtual MIDI port).
• Device: the destination name as a regex (e.g. ^loopMIDI)
• Message: kind ch number value (cc 1 7 64 / note 1 60 100 / pc 1 5)
• Set value to "value" to drive it from the input (for an Absolute fader).
help.instructions.Macro:
Sends several key inputs in order.
• One key per line (e.g. ctrl+c / ctrl+v / enter)
• Adjust the gap with the step delay (ms)
* When testing, focus the target window before running.
help.instructions.Toggle:
Alternates between key A and key B on each press (same as A if B is blank).
• Set "output device name, note number, [ch]" in the LED field to reflect
  the state on a controller LED (e.g. loopMIDI 36 1).
help.instructions.Plugin:
Calls a DLL extension in the plugins folder.
• Specify the plugin id, command name, and arguments (per the plugin's spec)
• See docs/05 §10 for details.
learn.editing: Editing a binding from the list. Confirm with "Save binding" after configuring.
learn.added: Added a new binding. Configure it and confirm with "Save binding".
learn.noDraft: No binding is being edited. Use "Add" or pick one from the list.
learn.noSignal: No MIDI signal received yet. Operate a device, then press this.
learn.selectBinding: Add or select a binding first.
learn.uiaHover: Hover the target UI element within 3 seconds…
learn.uiaFail: Could not capture an element. Please try again.
test.ran: Done. Check the result in the target app/device.
